## Store interface

An object that can be subscribed to and whose subscriptions will be notified when the value has changed.

Tip: Stores work best if you only use them for binding a model to your user interface, and nowhere else.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface Store<T> 
```

</td><td>

Gets the current value in this store.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[subscribe(callback)](./openrct2-flexui.store.subscribe.md)


</td><td>

Subscribes to this store. The subscription will be called when the value within this store has changed.
